title: BetMGM Named Casino Operator of the Year at EGR North America Awards 2022
text: BetMGM Casino wins industry honor following a year of tremendous growth JERSEY CITY, N.J., April 27, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- BetMGM, a leading sports betting and digital gaming company, has been named Casino Operator of the Year at EGR North America Awards 2022.

title: MGM Resorts' (MGM) BetMGM Unveils Online Offerings in Ontario
text: MGM Resorts' (MGM) BetMGM launches sports betting and iGaming platform in Ontario. With this, the company expands BetMGM's mobile and online product offerings to 23 states.

title: BETMGM LAUNCHES ONLINE SPORTS BETTING AND IGAMING IN ONTARIO
text: Launch marks first international expansion for leading gaming operator JERSEY CITY, N.J. , April 4, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- BetMGM, a leading sports betting and iGaming operator, announced today the launch of its online sports betting and iGaming platforms in Ontario, Canada.
